commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(model-3d): add face splitting to Circle and Arc tools

Both tools now split existing HEMesh faces when drawing on them,
matching the Rectangle tool's behavior. Circle generates a 32-point
N-gon polygon; Arc uses its curve points as a closed polygon (arc +
chord). Falls back to standalone 3D geometry on ground plane.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): preserve heFaceIds in cloneFaceData for group push-pull

cloneFaceData was copying heFaceId (singular) but dropping heFaceIds
(the group array), so extrudeFaceGroup was never called during push-pull.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(model-3d): add face groups for unified outer frame selection and push-pull

After polygon split, outer strip faces are now registered as a face group.
Clicking any strip highlights the entire frame; push-pulling extrudes all
strips together. Adds extrudeFaceGroup() for coordinated group extrusion
with proper wall creation only on the group boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: trails database & admin management (#187) (#214)

* feat: move trails to database with admin CRUD and V2 pack-options (#187)

- Add trail table with ~70 curated trails (name, country, continent, distance)
- Add trail_id FK to pack table with backfill migration
- New pkg/trails package with full admin CRUD + bulk endpoints
- V2 GET /api/v2/pack-options returns trails grouped by continent/country
- V1 pack-options now queries DB instead of hardcoded list
- Pack create/update resolves trail name to trail_id (dual-write)
- All pack queries JOIN trail table for name resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address Copilot review comments on trails PR

- Replace strings.Contains with pq.Error for unique constraint detection
- Propagate DB errors from GetPackOptionsValues/V2 instead of silent fallback
- Return domain errors (ErrTrailNameExists, ErrTrailInUse, ErrTrailNotFound)
  from bulk operations and map to proper HTTP status codes in handlers
- Merge trail validation and ID resolution into single DB lookup via
  resolveAndValidateTrail, distinguishing 400 (bad input) from 500 (lookup failure)
- Remove unused resolveTrailID function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Balance & affix overhaul: skill bar 5→4, resist rebalance, 7 new affixes (v49)

- Reduce skill bar from 5 to 4 slots (1 active + 3 utility) for harder build choices
- Shift ZONE_PHYS_RATIO 0.7→0.5 so capped resists reduce ~37.5% of damage (was ~22.5%)
- Restrict ES affixes to cloth armor only (plate/leather excluded, shields/belts unaffected)
- Add 7 new affixes: ailment duration, life leech, life on hit/kill, cooldown recovery,
  fortify effect, damage taken reduction — creating sustain and defensive build depth
- Wire all 7 new stats through engine: debuff scaling, leech stacking, fortify amplification,
  post-mitigation DR, and cooldown compression
- Save migration v48→v49: truncate 5th skill slot, clean up orphaned timers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add OWASP security hardening + exploit regression tests + digest system

Security fixes (OWASP audit):
- Fix IDOR on MT accounts endpoint (auth before DB queries)
- Fix IDOR on user statements endpoint (ownership check)
- Gate /api/health diagnostics behind admin auth
- Add Secure flag to impersonate session cookie
- Fix timing attack on worker token (crypto.timingSafeEqual)
- Fix SWITCH_TOPIC socket handler clan membership bypass
- Add security headers (X-Frame-Options, HSTS, CSP, Referrer-Policy)
- Remove dangerouslySetInnerHTML XSS vector in admin digests
- Replace $queryRawUnsafe with parameterized $queryRaw

Exploit regression tests (30 tests):
- Analysis upgrade loophole, retroactive match, duplicate MT ticket
- Manual resolution bypass, win rate manipulation, UNVERIFIED bypass
- Combined attack vectors, price manipulation in matching

Also includes digest system refactor and admin UI updates.

commit.message:
Add agent comment commands to CLI

Adds ability for agents to add comments and view comments on their tasks.

New CLI Commands:
- agent-todo agent add-comment <task-id> <comment>
  Add a comment to a task assigned to the agent

- agent-todo agent comments <task-id>
  List all comments on a task

Changes:
- Added agentAddCommentCmd and agentListCommentsCmd to cli/cmd/agent.go
- Added AuthorName field to Comment struct in cli/cmd/task.go
- Updated CLI README with documentation for new commands
- Added examples in Quick Start section

Agents can now:
1. List their tasks: agent-todo agent tasks
2. Update status: agent-todo agent update-status <id> <status>
3. Add comments: agent-todo agent add-comment <id> "comment"
4. View comments: agent-todo agent comments <id>

Backend already had the endpoints, this just adds CLI commands to use them.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: eliminate silent errors — all failures now visible to downstream

22 silent failure paths found and fixed:

CRITICAL — errors no longer masquerade as valid responses:
- _transcribe_with_context returns error code instead of fake text
  ("[timeout]" and "[transcription error]" were sent as transcription)
- WebSocket callers now send proper error JSON with code/statusCode
  instead of sending error strings as transcribed text
- /health endpoint now includes subsystems status (vad, lid, stt_en,
  stt_zh) so downstream can detect degraded service

IMPORTANT — all silent `pass` blocks now log:
- CUDA cache clear failure: warning logged
- StreamingVAD reset failure: warning logged
- WebSocket error send failure: warning logged
- WebSocket close failure: debug logged
- VAD frame errors: logged periodically (every 100th) not just first 3

IMPORTANT — log levels corrected for severity:
- detect_language LID unavailable: debug→warning (was invisible at INFO)
- detect_language LID error: debug→warning
- denoise failure: debug→warning
- is_speech/vad_confidence: documented as safe defaults (assume speech)

Added: models.subsystem_status() for health check visibility

commit.message:
Migrate from bincode to bitcode for binary cache serialization

bincode is no longer maintained. bitcode 0.6.9 is faster for both
serialize and deserialize, and produces smaller cache files.
Uses the serde feature for compatibility with existing FxHashMap types.
Bumps CACHE_VERSION to 2.

commit.message:
Redesign player network graph with tiered tab navigation and weight-based layout

Replace force-directed graph with a single-tier-at-a-time visualization where
connection strength drives node distance from center. Adds 7 tiers (Trenches,
Core, Regulars, Familiar, Occasional, Passing, Drifters) as tabs, golden angle
distribution for even spacing, and always-visible labels that scale with density.

fix(auth,context,metrics): JWKS JSON 파싱 예외 처리, bare Exception 구체화, 배치 카운터 경쟁 조건 수정 (#244, #245, #246) (#247)

- auth.py: JWKS 엔드포인트 응답의 json.JSONDecodeError 처리 추가
- context.py: bare Exception을 json.JSONDecodeError, httpx.HTTPError, TimeoutError로 구체화
- routes.py: describe_batch와 delete_description의 bare Exception을 구체적 예외로 교체
- metrics.py: 전역 카운터 제거, Prometheus gauge 값을 직접 사용하여 경쟁 조건 해소

chore: stagger macOS LaunchAgent schedules to 09:00+

Move all overnight tasks (backup, verify, weekly note, vault
maintenance) from 00:05-03:30 to 09:00-09:45 range. Since Mac
sleeps overnight, these fired simultaneously on wake anyway.
Staggering prevents resource contention on first open.

commit.message:
Add HuggingFace dataset auto-mapper with column name inference

hf_adapter() loads any HuggingFace dataset, matches column names to
world model field paths via regex rules (100+ patterns covering macro,
financial, commodities, climate, sentiment, etc.), and returns a
DatasetSpec ready for heterogeneous training. hf_inspect() previews
mappings without loading data.

[TAB 47] Fix /llm-matrix 500 – drei API-Bugs behoben

- store.provider_summary() → store.get_provider_summary() (Methode existierte nicht)
- matrix.as_dict() entfernt (MatrixBuilder.build() gibt bereits dict zurück)

Fix certificate issuance: add certificateable_type/id to fillable

The polymorphic columns were being passed by CertificateService but
silently stripped by mass assignment protection, causing a DB error
since the column has no default value.

commit.message:
feat: Visual Engine — diagram SVG, component blocks, text highlights, decorative rendering

Backend (carousel_processor.py):
- Extended Gemini prompt with diagram_data, text_highlights, component_blocks,
  decorative_elements, and branding extraction
- Added 3 new template families: bold_modern, storytelling_editorial, technical_diagram
- Added hub_spoke and funnel diagram types
- Added _build_diagram_data, _build_text_highlights, _build_component_blocks,
  _build_decorative, _build_branding schema helpers
- Enhanced extraction logging

Frontend (visual-engine.js — NEW):
- DiagramEngine: 7 SVG renderers (hub_spoke, arc/coherence_arc, flowchart,
  timeline, cycle, comparison, funnel) — all data-driven from schema
- ComponentRenderer: icon_cards, feature_cards, stat_blocks, icon_grid, quote_block
- TextHighlighter: inline accent color spans from text_highlights
- DecorativeRenderer: geometric line backgrounds, colored dividers
- BrandingRenderer: logo, footer, pagination overlays

Frontend (carousel-generator-preview.html):
- Rewrote applyVisualMode to use VisualEngine for all visual rendering
- Fixed visual area positioning (center canvas, full width)
- Added text highlight support to headline rendering
- Added component block injection into canvas
- Added decorative background and branding overlay rendering
- Stored _lastExtractedTemplate for cross-module access

commit.message:
Fix: add roundRect polyfill for older browsers

roundRect() on CanvasRenderingContext2D isn't available before
Chrome 99, Firefox 116, or Safari 17. Without the polyfill, the
complaint screen and couch sprites would crash with TypeError on
older devices.
